title: Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, 2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
doc_html:
SECTION 7--OF THE ACCOUNT TO BE RENDERED BY THE

Art. 1191.  Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
